title: PolityKit Scenario
description: A PolityKit simulation scenario with starting conditions and scheduled shocks.

seed.description: Optional deterministic random seed for the scenario. CLI and API requests may override this value.

ticks.description: Number of ticks to simulate. Shock ticks must be within 0 and ticks - 1.

initialPopulation.description: Number of citizens generated when the scenario starts.

shocks.description: Scheduled shocks applied before model decisions on their tick.

resourcePool.description: Starting resources available to each model run.

shock.description: A scheduled event that changes world conditions.

tick.description: Zero-based tick on which the shock is applied. Must be less than the scenario ticks value.

type.description: Shock type. Built-in handled values include CropFailure, MedicineShortage, HousingLoss, AdministrativeOverload, AdminLoss, and CorruptionSpike. Custom nonblank values are allowed and use the default stability-impact behavior.

severity.description: Shock severity, where 0 has no effect and 1 is maximum severity.

parameters.description: Optional shock-specific parameter bag reserved for custom or future shock handlers.
